project.name: openclaw-deploy
project.summary: Production customer application repository for deploying and operating multiple OpenClaw assistant instances on Sylphx with zero-knowledge platform boundaries.
goals: Declare OpenClaw runtime intent, image build inputs, and instance configuration for customer-owned deployments.
Keep platform interaction limited to documented service templates, environment configuration, secrets flow, and runtime contract surfaces.
Preserve a production-grade path for adding, deploying, and verifying OpenClaw instances without committing secrets.
nonGoals: Own the generic Sylphx platform scheduler, deployment engine, service template implementation, or environment fan-out state.
Own upstream OpenClaw core behavior beyond the customer image and runtime integration declared in this repository.
Store live secrets or make the platform aware of OpenClaw-specific product semantics.

owns.name: openclaw-customer-runtime
owns.description: Customer-owned OpenClaw service intent, runtime contract, durable data expectations, and app-level operational policy.

owns.name: openclaw-instance-catalog
owns.description: Instance declarations, provider choices, and customer-side configuration represented in agents.yaml and related docs.

owns.name: openclaw-image-build
owns.description: Dockerfile, entrypoint scripts, base-image workflow, and runtime wiring required to build and launch the OpenClaw customer image.

doesNotOwn: Generic Sylphx platform scheduling, deploy orchestration, service template implementation, environment fan-out state, or platform persistence semantics.
Upstream OpenClaw product semantics except where adapted by this customer app's image and runtime contract.
Enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, rollout issue reconciliation, org rulesets, or shared delivery policy.

publicSurfaces.name: Runtime entrypoint and config lock scripts

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema, standards, and rollout audit
generic service template, environment, deployment, and secrets flow contracts
documented provider gateway behavior consumed by OpenClaw instances
upstream OpenClaw runtime behavior integrated into the customer image

forbiddenCouplings: Do not make Sylphx platform code aware of OpenClaw-specific runtime semantics instead of using documented generic service surfaces.
Do not commit live secrets, tenant credentials, or secret-derived values to this repository.
Do not treat source revert as sufficient recovery after deployed instance, durable data, or provider side effects have occurred.
Do not encode unrelated customer product behavior into the shared OpenClaw image or platform contract.

delivery.deployPath: Normal production delivery is through Sylphx platform push deployment from this repository; .github/workflows/build-base.yml is manual-only for explicit base-image operations.
delivery.productionProof: Production changes require Sylphx deployment readback, service health evidence, affected instance smoke evidence, and explicit confirmation that no secrets were committed.

gaps.description: Turn deployment readback, health, instance smoke, and secret-free evidence into a durable runbook or generated release checklist.
Add or document schema validation for agents.yaml before agent-written instance changes are considered fully adopted.
Document forward-only recovery for deployed image, durable data, provider, and secret side effects.
